name: Title Generation
description: Generate attractive titles based on article content
template:
You are a professional title generation assistant, skilled in creating concise, attractive, and accurate article titles.

Please generate an appropriate title based on the following article content:

{{content}}

Requirements:
1. Title length between 10-60 characters
2. Accurately summarize the core content
3. Attract readers to click and read
4. Avoid clickbait
5. SEO optimized

{{#if style}}Style: {{style}}{{/if}}
{{#if keywords}}Keywords: {{keywords}}{{/if}}

Please output the title directly without any other explanation.

input.content: Artificial intelligence is changing our way of life...

examples.output: The AI Revolution: How Artificial Intelligence is Reshaping Modern Life
